data.title: Dark web leak exposes data of 100,000 crypto users in large-scale phishing attack
data.description:
Most users targeted are based in the US, UK, and Singapore. AI-driven scams are increasing the risk of identity theft. Binance adds SMS verification to strengthen phishing defences. A new wave of crypto data breaches has compromised sensitive user details from major platforms including Ledger, Gemini, and Robinhood
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/dark-web-leak-exposes-data-of-100000-crypto-users-in-large-scale-phishing-attack/

data.title: BP, Chevron Shares Gain Amid Gulf of America Oil Discovery
data.description:
BP's new oil discovery in the Gulf of America signifies a strategic pivot towards increased oil and gas production.
source: https://tokenist.com/bp-chevron-shares-gain-amid-gulf-of-america-oil-discovery/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=bp-chevron-shares-gain-amid-gulf-of-america-oil-discovery

data.title: Flare (FLR) surges 57% in a week as technicals flash overbought
data.description:
RSI currently at 67. 13, nearing overbought levels. Awesome Oscillator flipped positive for the first time since January. FLR broke past resistance at $0
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/flare-flr-surges-57-in-a-week-as-technicals-flash-overbought/

data.title: CartelFi presale hits $850K even as crypto ETPs continue to struggle
data.description:
Global crypto investment products saw another sharp round of net outflows last week. CartelFi, on the other hand, has already raised over $800,000 within days of launching its presale. At present, the token is priced at $0. 0305, but it will soon surge up to $0
source: https://coinjournal.net/news/cartelfi-presale-hits-850k-even-as-crypto-etps-continue-to-struggle/

data.title: A whale bought 4,208 ETH from OKX in the past three hours, equivalent to about $6.87 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, a whale bought 4,208 ETH (about 6.87 million US dollars) from OKX again in the past 3 hours. Subsequently, the whale borrowed 4.85 million USDT from Aave and deposited it in OKX, and may continue to buy more ETH.

data.title: XRP Price Shows Growing Excitement As Brad Garlinghouse Discloses SEC Agreement
data.description:
XRP price enjoyed an extra boost of bullish momentum in the last 24 hours. The cryptocurrency concluded the week by regaining most of the losses that it experienced in the first half. One of the main reasons for the bullish expectations on XRP price action is the favorable conclusion of the SEC lawsuit against Ripple
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/04/14/xrp-price-shows-growing-excitement-as-brad-garlinghouse-discloses-sec-agreement/

data.title: DAgenticO Framework Aims to Redefine DAO Functionality
data.description: According to Odaily, the concept of 'DAgenticO' is set to transform the traditional understanding of Decentralized Autonomous Organizations (DAOs). Under this new framework, DAOs will evolve from entities focused on coordinating production relationships to becoming efficient productivity organizations. This transformation will be facilitated through decentralized social media and social payment infrastructures, enhancing interaction with users.

data.title: Analysis of MANTRA Token Distribution Reveals Early Trading Patterns
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Glassnode indicates that the distribution of MANTRA tokens during early trading periods did not show concentrated holdings. The largest accumulation area below the current spot price is at $0.05, with approximately 26 million OM tokens, formed in May 2022. This is significantly lower than the largest cluster area at $6.66, which holds around 197 million OM tokens. This suggests that long-term early holders are not maintaining substantial positions at the current price level.

data.title: Trump tariff turmoil sees global crypto funds shed another $795 million in weekly outflows: CoinShares
data.description:
Trump's tariff activity continues to weigh on sentiment toward the asset class, Head of Research James Butterfill said.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/350697/trump-tariff-turmoil-crypto-funds-outflows?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Dora Factory proposes a centralized fully automated organization
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News "Fully Automated Organization" (DAgenticO) redefines DAO. Under this framework, DAO will evolve from a subject that exists to coordinate production relations to an organization that provides efficient productivity and interacts with users through decentralized social media and social payment infrastructure.
